question: In the given image, what is the spatial relation between the girl and the net? Select from the following options: (A) The girl is on the left side of the net. (B) The girl is standing behind the net. (C) The girl is standing in front of the net. (D) The girl is on the right side of the net.
gold_answer: The girl is standing behind the net
answer_choices: The girl is on the left side of the net
The girl is standing behind the net
The girl is standing in front of the net
The girl is on the right side of the net
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
